texto: When people throw at you with toxic words
autor: Rule number one: do not set any equivalent actions.Do not give back as you were given.It is better to transform those in positve words -And use them to build a tower of grateful sublime.
explicacao: Citação de Rule number one: do not set any equivalent actions.Do not give back as you were given.It is better to transform those in positve words -And use them to build a tower of grateful sublime. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “When people throw at you with toxic words” articula reflexao, sir-kristian-goldmund-aumann, people em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
